channel.title: AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns

item.title: MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart
item.description: This pattern deploys a multi-tenant AI code assistant with NVIDIA Nemotron models, tiered rate limiting, and IDE integration on OpenShift.

item.title: RAG AI Quickstart
item.description: This pattern deploys the RAG AI Quickstart with test pipelines on CPU or GPU.
